pending_context.candidate_correction: a doctor (uncertain — likely Dr. Aaron Shirley
pending_context.notes: SRT lines 2243-2247: "There was a name for this doctor, a renacy maler. And they had those clinics in a lot of times." — same low-confidence clinic-physician name from P1.30/P2.71. "Renacy maler" phonetic anchor weak; canonical Mileston/Holmes-County MCHR physicians per published rosters were Geiger, Shirley, Britton, Barnes. Retain LOW; flag for adversarial.

SRT line 1919: "Was this during a murder of the parks?" — context (SRT lines 1903-1915: rocks thrown from boxcars at marchers, police looking on, white spectators "calling us some of everything") fits the 1966 Meredith March against Fear timeframe (June 1966) better than the 1963 Medgar Evers assassination (which would predate the Mileston Community Center scenes). Alternative: Vernon Dahmer assassination (Jan 1966 Hattiesburg). Either way, "parks" is NOT the canonical noun. Demote from flagged to medium-canonical; needs adversarial pick between Dahmer/Meredith.

pass9_metadata.credit_formula: match_factor * min(0.10, max(0, 0.02 + 0.001*healed - 0.005*fails)); credit = 0 if healed=0 or match<0.3
